cards.front: What is the difference between a LAN and a WAN?
cards.back: A LAN covers a small local area, while a WAN covers a much larger geographical area.
It translates domain names into IP addresses.

cards.front: Name two wired/wireless network protocols from the specification.
cards.back: Examples include Ethernet, Wi‑Fi, TCP/IP, HTTP, HTTPS, FTP and email protocols.
Data is broken into packets and sent across a network, possibly taking different routes.
